title: orobanche oxyloba
intro: Orobanche oxyloba is a parasitic flowering plant in the broomrape family, Orobanchaceae, characterized by its yellow flowers and a habit of attaching itself to the roots of its host plant. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory agent, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Orobanche oxyloba include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Orobanche oxyloba is often dried and used in teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
